description: residential electric utility bill with a charges breakdown and a meter reading

billingPeriodStart.description: the start date of the billing period in YYYY-MM-DD.

billingPeriodEnd.description: the end date of the billing period in YYYY-MM-DD.

consumptionKwh.description: the metered electricity consumption in kWh for the period.

charges.description: the electric charge line items, each a charge name and its amount. exclude the total/summary row.

description.description: the charge name as printed on the line.

totalElectricBill.description: the total electric bill amount, equal to the sum of the charge lines.
